title: Sourcing & Quotation Analyst
category: Procurement and logistics, Information Technology, Business Development, Sales, Supply Chain Management
description: Role Summary We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours. Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable. This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you. Duties and Responsibilities Opportunity Research Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities. Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for. Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management. Item Sourcing Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item. Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out. Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source. Vendor Communication Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms. Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear. Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work. Quotation Preparation Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly. Build professional quotations using company templates. Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out. Coordination and Records Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups. Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily. Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy. Never miss a deadline. Discipline and Work Ethic Log in on time. Every shift. Respond quickly on email, WhatsApp, and internal tools during your hours. Keep a professional tone in every vendor interaction. Own your work. No excuses, no shortcuts. Job Requirements Must-Have Fluent English. Spoken and written. You must be able to hold a clear, confident conversation on the phone with international vendors. This is not negotiable. Strong IT background. Comfortable with advanced Google search, Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, filters, sorting), email tools, cloud storage, and basic CRM systems. Sharp critical thinking. You can read a requirement, understand what is being asked, and spot gaps or risks in a vendor's quote. Night shift availability. Ready to work 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time, Monday to Friday, without exception. Serious attention to detail. Numbers, SKUs, quantities, and dates must always be right. Discipline and work ethic. Self-driven, reliable, consistent. You do not need someone standing over you to get the work done. Confident on calls. Polite, professional, clear. No slang, no shortcuts. Hungry. You want to build something real and you are willing to put in the work to get there. Nice-to-Have Previous experience in procurement, sourcing, or supply chain. Exposure to international tenders or B2B quotation work. Experience with tender portals or sourcing platforms. Familiarity with Notion, ClickUp, Trello, or similar project management tools. Basic knowledge of IT hardware, industrial equipment, or logistics. Do Not Apply If You are looking for a 9 to 5. You cannot commit to the night shift. You need to be chased to finish work. Your English is weak and you plan to fake it on vendor calls. You cannot. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates should submit their updated CV along with a short introduction (2 to 3 paragraphs) explaining why they are a good fit for this role and confirming their availability for the night shift (5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time). Send applications to: procurement@vastglobelogistics.com Please write "Sourcing & Quotation Analyst Application" in the email subject line. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications without a proper introduction will not be considered.

title: System Administrator
description:
About UA Telecom
UA Telecom is a dynamic and rapidly expanding Internet Service Provider (ISP) in Afghanistan. with operations dating back to 2013. We deliver reliable, high-speed internet services nationwide, utilizing technologies such Wireless, Fiber Optic, Microwave, and VSAT Platforms. Our focus is on providing practical, efficient connectivity solutions tailored to the unique needs of businesses, organizations, and individuals. As we continue to expand, we are dedicated to making a tangible impact by creating local job opportunities and fostering long-term social development in Afghanistan.
For more information, visit www.uatelecom.af

Job Description
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISPвҖҷs core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.
Key Responsibilities:
Network Infrastructure & Security
Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
Record customersвҖҷ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
Maintain records of customers and sitesвҖҷ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: BachelorвҖҷs degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a MasterвҖҷs degree in a related major field.
With a BachelorвҖҷs degree: minimum of 5 yearsвҖҷ experience in system or network administration; with a MasterвҖҷs degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 30, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2154-A - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

Submission Email
vacancies@uatelecom.af

ЩҫЩҲЩҮЩҶШӘЩҲЩҶ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁШ®Шҙ ШӘШӯЩӮЫҢЩӮШҢ ШўЩ…ЩҲШІШҙ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЫҢ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…Ъ©Ш§ШұЫҢвҖҢЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ ШӘЩ„Ш§Шҙ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ ШӘШ§ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶЩҮ ШұШҙШҜ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ Щ…ШӯШөЩ„Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҒШұШ§ЩҮЩ… ШіШ§ШІШҜ
Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ ЪҜШұЩҲЩҫ: ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ ЩҫЩҲЩҮЩҶШӘЩҲЩҶ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶШҢ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ Ъ©Ш§ШЁЩ„ШҢ 5 Ш§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢШӘЫҢЩҲШӘ Ш·ШЁЫҢ ЩҲ 17 ШЁШ§ШЁ Щ„ЫҢШіЩҮ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЫҢ ШҜШұ ШҙЩҮШұ Ъ©Ш§ШЁЩ„ Щ…ЫҢШЁШ§ШҙШҜ. Ъ©ЩҮ ШӯШҜЩҲШҜШ§ 20000 ШҙШ§ЪҜШұШҜ ЩҲ Щ…ШӯШөЩ„ ШҜШұ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҜ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШўЩ…ЩҲШІШҙЫҢШҢ ШўЩ…ЩҲШІШҙ Щ…ЫҢШЁЫҢЩҶШҜ.

Job Description
Ыұ-ШұЩҮЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЫҢ Ш§Ш№Ш¶Ш§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШҜШұ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…ШӯШөЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш·ШЁЩӮ Щ…ЩӮШұШұЩҮ ШӘШӯШөЫҢЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӣ
ЫІ-Ш§ШұШІЫҢШ§ШЁЫҢ ШўШ«Ш§Шұ ЩҲ Ъ©ЩҶЩҒШұШ§ЩҶШі ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ Ш§Ш№Ш¶Ш§ЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШҜШұ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ ЩҲ ШіШ§ЫҢШұ ШҜШ§ЩҶШҙЩ…ЩҶШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ Ш§ШЁШұШ§ШІ ЩҶШёШұ ШҜШұ ШұШ§ШЁШ·ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§Шӣ
Ыі-Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Ъ© ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҜШұ Щ…ШӯШ§ЩҒЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ Щ…ЩҶШӯЫҢШ« ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮШҢ ШіШ®ЩҶШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Ъ© Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮШӣ
Ыҙ-Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Ъ© ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҜШұ Ъ©Щ…ЫҢШӘЩҮ ЩҮШ§ШҢ Щ…Ш¬Ш§Щ„Ші ЩҲ ШҙЩҲШұШ§ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢШӣ
Ыө-ШіЩҮЩ…ЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ Щ…ШіЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШЁЩҮШЁЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ…ЩҲШұ ЩҫЩҲЩҮЩҶШӯЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…ЩҲШіШіЩҮ ШӘШӯШөЫҢЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЫҢ Щ…ШұШЁЩҲШ·ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶШёЩҲШұ Ш§ЩҶЪ©ШҙШ§ЩҒ ЩҫЫҢШҙШұЩҒШӘ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ ЩҲ ШӯЩҒШё Щ…ЩҶШ§ЩҒШ№ ЩҲ Щ…ШөЩ„ШӯШӘ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…ЩҲШіШіЩҮШӣ
Ы¶-Ш§ШұШӘЩӮШ§ЫҢ ШіЩҲЫҢЩҮ ЫҢ ШҜШ§ЩҶШҙ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲЫҢЪҳЩҮ ШҜШұ ШұШҙШӘЩҮ ЫҢ Ш§Ш®ШӘШөШ§ШөЫҢ ЩҲ Ъ©ШіШЁ Щ…ЩҮШ§ШұШӘ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш§ЩҶЩҶШҜ: ШўЩ…ЩҲШІШҙ ЫҢЪ© ШІШЁШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШӘШЁШұ ШЁЫҢЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„Щ„ЫҢ ЩҲ Ъ©Щ…ЩҫЫҢЩҲШӘШұШӣ
Ы·-ШӘЩҮЫҢЫҢЩҮ Щ„Ъ©ЪҶШұ ЩҶЩҲШӘ ЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШұЩҮЩҶЩ…ЩҲШҜ Ъ©Ш§Шұ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ вҖ“ ШіШ§ШӯЩҲЫҢ ЩҲ Щ„Ш§ШЁШұШ§ШӘЩҲШ§ШұЫҢШӣ
Ыё-ШұЩҮШЁШұЫҢ ЩҲ Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Ъ© ШҜШұ ШӘШ§Щ„ЫҢЩҒ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШҜШұШіЫҢШҢ Щ…Щ…ШҜ ШҜШұШіЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…ШұШ¬Ш№Шӣ
ЫұЫ°- Ш№Ш¶ЩҲ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ ШҜШұ ШӘШӯЩӮЫҢЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢШӣ
ЫұЫұ-Ш§ШҙШӘШұШ§Ъ© ШҜШұ Ш§Щ…ШӘШӯШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ ЩҲШұЩҲШҜЫҢ Щ…ШӯШөЩ„Ш§ЩҶ Ш¬ШҜЫҢШҜШҙЩ…ЩҲЩ„Шӣ
ЫұЫІ-ШіШ§ЫҢШұ ЩҒШ№Ш§Щ„ЫҢШӘ ЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ЩҲШёШ§ЫҢЩҒ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ШӘШӯШөЫҢЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…ШӨШіШіЩҮ ШӘШӯШөЫҢЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЫҢ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙ ШЁЫҢЩҶЫҢ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘШӣ

Job Requirements
ШӯШҜ Ш§ЩӮЩ„ ШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜЩҮ ШӘШӯШөЫҢЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢЩҮ Щ…Ш§ШіШӘШұ ШҜШұ ШұШҙШӘЩҮ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜШҢЪ©Щ…ЩҫЫҢЩҲШӘШұ ШіШ§ЫҢЩҶШіШҢ ШҙШұШ№ЫҢШ§ШӘШҢ
ШӯШҜ Ш§ЩӮЩ„ ШіЩҮ ШіШ§Щ„ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұЫҢ ШҜШұ ШЁШ®Шҙ ШӘШҜШұЫҢШі ШҜШұ ШіШ·Шӯ ЩҫЩҲЩҮЩҶШӘЩҲЩҶ ШұШ§ ШҜШ§ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ .
ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…ЩҮШ§ШұШӘ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҮ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҒЫҢШі Ъ©Щ…ЩҫЫҢЩҲШӘШұ ШұШ§ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ
ШӘШіЩ„Ш· Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ ШЁЩҮ ШІШЁШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Щ…Щ„ЫҢ (ШҜШұЫҢ ЩҲ ЩҫШҙШӘЩҲ) ЩҲ Ш§ЩҶЪҜЩ„ЫҢШіЫҢ ШЁЩ„ШҜЫҢШӘ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ.
ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШұЩҮШЁШұЫҢ ЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШҙШЁШұШҜ ШӘШӯЩӮЫҢЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щ…ЫҢ ШұШ§ ШҜШ§ШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙШҜ.

Submission Guideline
Ш§ШІ Ш№Щ…ЩҲЩ…ЫҢ Щ…ШӘЩӮШ§Ш¶ЫҢШ§ЩҶ ЪҜШұШ§Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҲШ§Ш¬ШҜ ШҙШұШ§ЫҢШ· ЩҮШіШӘЩҶШҜШҢ Ш®Щ„Шө ШіЩҲШ§ЩҶШӯ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ЩҮЩ…ШұШ§ЫҢ Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҶ Ш§ШіЩҶШ§ШҜ ШӘШӯШөЫҢЩ„ЫҢШҢШӘШ°Ъ©ШұЩҮ ШӘШ§ШЁШ№ЫҢШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ШіЪ©ЩҶ ЩӮШұШ§ШұШҜШ§ШҜ Ш®Ш·/ШіЩҶШҜ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ ЩҶЩҲШҙШӘЩҶ ЩҶШ§Щ… ЩҫЩҲЩҮЩҶШӯЫҢ Щ…ШұШЁЩҲШ·ЩҮ ЩҲ Ш°Ъ©Шұ ЩҲЩҲЪ©ЩҶШіЫҢ ЩҶЩ…ШЁШұ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…ЫҢЩ„ ШўШҜШұШі ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш°ЫҢЩ„ Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ШЁШҜШ§ШұЩҶШҜ ЫҢШ§ ЩҮШ§ШұШҜ ШўЩҶШұШ§ ШӘШіЩ„ЫҢЩ… ШўЩ…ШұЫҢШӘ Щ…ЩҶШ§ШЁШ№ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҜ ШӘШіЩ„ЫҢЩ… ЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш§ЫҢШҜ.

description:
Role Summary
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.

title: Customer Service Agent - English Translator.
description: About Speenkai Speenkai is Afghanistan's first and leading BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) service company, specializing in providing comprehensive administrative and technical support to Afghan-owned companies abroad. Our mission is to empower Afghan entrepreneurs and businesses operating internationally by offering high-quality, reliable support services from our base in Afghanistan. With a team of skilled professionals, we help Afghan companies streamline their operations, enhance efficiency, and achieve success. Job Summary Night-Shift Job Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Dispatchers/Customer Service Representatives. In this role, you will take inbound calls, set appointments for customers, and dispatch technicians efficiently. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily operations, including planning, scheduling, and managing the tech force. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH to save yourself time. If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you! Duties & Responsibilities Duties & Responsibilities 1. Receive incoming calls from clients and setup service appointments. 2. Receive incoming calls from technicians throughout the shift. 3. Keep track of daily schedule and job status throughout work schedule. 4. Respond to open email requests and inquiries via email 5. Ability to enter tickets into the CRM Job Requirements Job Requirements В· Fluent in English and must possess excellent verbal and written skills. вҖў Motivated self-starter вҖў Office work experience вҖў Ability to multitask in fast paced environment is crucial. вҖў Capable of typing 45+ words per minute necessary вҖў Customer Service skills and Conflict Resolution skills. вҖў Telemarketing experience is a plus вҖў Microsoft Office Products Submission Guideline This link will redirect you to an online assessment. There a video question at the end. If you don not answer, you application will not be accepted. The assessment is around 50 minutes long. Find a quiet place and stable internet. Answers from Ai and cheating cold be identified and will ruin your chances to be considered. Click on the link below, enter your email, and the assessment will be sent to your email to start. Good Luck. https://app.testtrick.com/public-invitation/e885f319cea28b209c18006ed8106143-56e8c05f9ca1d33d4a0c544fc4c87568 Functional Area Sales/Marketing Management Administrative Translation Communication Operation Data Collection Data Entry OPERATIONS Countries Afghanistan Provinces Kabul Apply Now

title: Software Developer
description:
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company
Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability.
With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services . We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world.
Our Services
Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more.
Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software.
IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity.
Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments.
E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways.
Why Choose Us?
Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions.
Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications.
Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs.
Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations.
Our Vision
To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth.
Our Mission
To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success.
Job Summary

Job Descriptions
We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company . The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications.
This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies . As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance , and troubleshoot technical challenges.

Job Requirements
Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role.
Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP) .
Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices.
Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js).
Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory).
Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration .
Understanding of security best practices , including data encryption and secure authentication.
Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel .
Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control .
Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) .
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team.

Submission Guidelines
Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line .
CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on.
Email Submission: Send your application to hushmandshahar@gmail.com before the deadline.

Submission Email
hushmandshahar@gmail.com
Apply
